result.response_content_preview:
THOUGHT:
The search results successfully retrieved the target paper. Result 1 ("Do ImageNet Classifiers Generalize to ImageNet?") is the peer-reviewed ICML 2019 publication that encompasses both the CIFAR-10 and ImageNet analyses, making it the definitive citation for this work. It directly addresses benchmark fragility, test set reuse, and the illusion of progress in offline evaluations. This perfectly complements the existing citations by focusing on evaluation methodology pitfalls and the gap between controlled benchmark metrics and true generalization. I will select result 1 and update the description accordingly.
